'''vanungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pockmanteau|pockmanteau]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pockmanteau|pockmanteau]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vanungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væningith|væningith]] || [[word:væningij|væningij]] || [[word:væningish|væningish]] || [[word:væningi|væningi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanununguth|vanununguth]] || [[word:vanununguj|vanununguj]] || [[word:vanunungush|vanunungush]] || [[word:vanunungu|vanunungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanunguth|vanunguth]] || [[word:vanunguj|vanunguj]] || [[word:vanungush|vanungush]] || [[word:vanungu|vanungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanufnguth|vanufnguth]] || [[word:vanufnguj|vanufnguj]] || [[word:vanufngush|vanufngush]] || [[word:vanufnguf|vanufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanunguthu|vanunguthu]] || [[word:vanunguju|vanunguju]] || [[word:vanungushu|vanungushu]] || [[word:vanunguku|vanunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanunguth|vanunguth]] || [[word:vanunguj|vanunguj]] || [[word:vanungush|vanungush]] || [[word:vanungu|vanungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanunguthul|vanunguthul]] || [[word:vanungujul|vanungujul]] || [[word:vanungushul|vanungushul]] || [[word:vanungukul|vanungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanunguthuthu|vanunguthuthu]] || [[word:vanungujuju|vanungujuju]] || [[word:vanungushushu|vanungushushu]] || [[word:vanunguku|vanunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanunguthun|vanunguthun]] || [[word:vanungujun|vanungujun]] || [[word:vanungushun|vanungushun]] || [[word:vanungukun|vanungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanunguthuoro|vanunguthuoro]] || [[word:vanungujuoro|vanungujuoro]] || [[word:vanungushuoro|vanungushuoro]] || [[word:vanungukuoro|vanungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
